title: Why the Villainess Wields the Sword
titleEnglish: Why the Villainess Wields the Sword
synonyms: The Reason Why the Villainess Picked up a Sword
The Reason the Villainess Took Up the Sword
悪女が剣を持った理由
synopsis: No one knows how the pampered and wicked Erin Lisus suddenly becomes a top swordsman at Atenz Academy. That's because they don't realize that Erin was actually transported to the past after being killed by her stepmother and was reborn into different worlds. Now, with her past experience as a swordmaster, Erin's out to get revenge and rescue her allies from her stepmother's grasp. But with foes at every corner, can Erin save her loved ones? Or will her reason to wield the sword vanish with them? (Source: Tapas)

synopsis: There stood a seemingly ordinary shepherd named Turan from Hisaril Hill. Having lived while hiding his talent as a great archwizard, he finally steps out into the world. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Miraereul Boneun Tujaja
synonyms: The Investor Who Sees the Future
synopsis: Kang Jin-hoo gains an extraordinary ability to foresee the future after a life-changing accident during his military service. Armed with this unique power, he dives into the world of investments, targeting companies and financial markets to amass wealth and become the world’s top investor. But his vision extends beyond just making money. Kang Jin-hoo’s foresight begins to influence the global economy, political systems, major corporations, and even the course of globalization itself. Now, with his sights set on reshaping the world of finance and beyond, he is about to rewrite the rules of the future. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Levius/est
synopsis: Having fought his way into the top grade of Mechanical Martial Arts, Levius faces an ever-changing world that grows more threatening by the day. The shadowy megacorporation Amethyst wields its military might across the world through advancements in the arena. Can Levius be the fighter who changes the course of the world’s fate? (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Space Cheon-ma 3077
synopsis: Qi, swords, martial artists… and robots and spaceships?! The year is 3077, thousands of years after the heyday of the martial arts realm. Humanity inhabits the stars, governed by interstellar martial arts organizations who kept the old ways of the realm alive: might makes right! For bounty hunters like Seryeong, Robert, and Sunja, this means trouble is good for business, except when they bite off more than they can chew. After venturing to the irradiated wasteland of Earth for a top bounty, only to find a 2,000-year-old martial artist instead, they realize their fortunes are about to change… (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Little Mushroom
synopsis: Decades have passed since the Earth's magnetic poles disappeared, changing the balance forever. As the last remnants of humanity huddle in their bases, the remaining lifeforms have mutated into so-called xenogens and taken over the outside world. In the midst of this war for life or death, a sentient mushroom lived his little life in the forest. That is, until humans came and took something precious from him — his spore. With his life's purpose gone, the young xenogen is ready to risk his life to reclaim it. So, donning a dead boy's face and calling himself An Zhe, the little mushroom makes an attempt to infiltrate a human base. To get inside, he must first get past the Supreme Judge Lu Feng, whose job it is to detect and kill any mutants who try to sneak through the gate. It is said that nothing can escape his cold sight, which is now locked on An Zhe... (Source: Aloha Comics) Note: Silver Award winner at the 12th Chinese Nebula Awards for Chinese Science Fiction.

title: Mugi Meokneun Seojanim
synopsis: The peak of strength in South Korea is the Esteemed Martial Lee Clan. In that martial clan, Lee Cheol was looked down on and chased out because of his status as an illegitimate child. In order to survive, he lived in shadows, but he was chased down and killed because of his family's schemes. He was then granted a second chance—regression. Using his "ability to absorb the memories of a weapon" as a foundation, Lee Cheol would train and go down a path of struggle. Persistent competition and schemes regarding the right to inheritance, attacks from other races and monsters in dangerous, unexplored lands, and even local clashes related to his family's internal struggles... His growth would bring about these things, bringing hardship upon Lee Cheol. Life itself would be a struggle for Lee Cheol, and this is his destiny. But in order to protect himself and his surroundings—in order to protect everything—as the fight continues, he'll unravel secrets from his past life, one by one...! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Apocalypse-Level Death Knight Returns
synonyms: Return of the Apocalypse-Class Death Knight
synopsis: Everyone's talking about how troublemaker Demian Haxen's suddenly become a devoted son and brother. What they don't realize is that he's returned to the past after spending decades as the brainwashed death knight of Dorgo, the archlich who murdered Demian's family. Given a second chance at life, Demian's out to power up and protect his family to defeat Dorgo when he comes to conquer the world. But will Demian alone be enough to prevent the apocalypse? Or will his failure mean death for them all? (Source: Tapas)

title: Mobile Suit Gundam: The Origin
titleNative: 機動戦士ガンダム The Origin
synopsis: Zeon ace pilot, Commander Char Aznable, thought he could foil the Federation's plan to build a mobile suit by attacking their research base on colony Side 7. He was wrong. With a prototype already active, the besieged Federation forces strike back using their new weapon, the mobile suit Gundam, with devastating consequences. Amidst the fighting, young electronics wizard Amuro Ray is determined not to let his friends and family die in the crossfire. But what can one boy do to repel a squad of mobile suit-clad invaders? (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Ace of the Diamond Act II
titleEnglish: Ace of the Diamond Act II
synopsis: I want to pitch to that mitt, just one more time… When Eijun Sawamura was just fifteen, he met someone who changed the course of his life forever—the catcher Kazuya Miyuki. Now, he's said goodbye to family and friends to travel to Seido High, where he can test his baseball skills alongside some of the best in the nation! (Source: K MANGA)

title: Cross Game
synopsis: Cross Game is a moving drama that is heartfelt and true, yet in the brilliant hands of manga artist Mitsuru Adachi, delightfully flows with a light and amusing touch. The series centers around a boy named Ko, the family of four sisters who live down the street and the game of baseball. This poignant coming-of-age story will change your perception of what shonen manga can be. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Phoenix
synopsis: "All things are born and all things die. That is the law of heaven." According to legend, the Bird of Fire called the Phoenix is the eternal spirit of life, death and rebirth. She oversees the cycle of reincarnation and the rising and falling of civilizations and species. Those who can obtain her blood will be granted eternal life, while to others she can grant infinite wisdom, or eternal suffering. Throughout history, from the dawn of civilization to the extinction of the human race, those human souls touched by the Phoenix have hunted her over and over in multiple reincarnations, and their actions in one life determine or reflect the sins and sufferings of other lifetimes. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: This is an incomplete series due to Tezuka's death.

title: +99 Reinforced Wooden Stick
synonyms: +99 ท่อนไม้พร้อมบวก
synopsis: Welcome to “Chrono Life,” a virtual reality game where only the strongest survive. Ji-u logs in to “Chrono Life,” only to be ignored and ridiculed by the other players for his lack of experience, crappy items, and being an overall noob. But when he upgrades his wooden stick to the max reinforcement level of +99, Ji-u realizes he has the power to split continents and slay armies of thousands in just one swing. “It’s time to teach the rest of you a lesson, you f*ckers.” (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Kowloon Generic Romance
titleNative: 九龍ジェネリックロマンス
synonyms: เกาลูน อุบัติรักปริศนาลับ
synopsis: Welcome to Kowloon Walled City: a dystopian townscape where the people are brimming with nostalgia, and where the past, present, and future converge. Amid the hidden emotions and extraordinary daily lives of the men and women working in its confines, a tale of romance begins to unfold for real estate agent Reiko Kujirai—one that feels as familiar as Kowloon itself… (Source: Yen Press) Note: - Nominated for the 14th Manga Taisho Award in 2021. - Nominated for the 6th Tsugimanga Award in the Print Manga Category in 2020.

title: xxxHOLiC
synopsis: Kimihiro Watanuki is haunted by visions of ghosts and spirits. He seeks help from a mysterious woman named Yuko, who claims she can help. However, Watanuki must work for Yuko in order to pay for her aid. Soon Watanuki finds himself employed in Yuko’s shop where he sees things and meets customers that are stranger than anything he could have ever imagined. (Source: Kodansha USA) Notes: - The series was re-named to xxxHolic•Rou on chapter title pages of chapter 186 and on, but not on their volume's front covers, spines and indicia. - The chapter count contains a one-shot published in May 2010 to commemorate the switch, which was later collected into Volume 18. - The chapter count also reflects the magazine releases; the chapters plus the one-shot were re-arranged into 109 chapters across 19 volumes.

tags.description: Works that feature themes of social dissociation, delusions, and other issues like suicide, bullying, self-isolation, paranoia, and technological necessity in daily lives. Classic iconography: telephone poles, rooftops, and trains.

title: The Player Who Can't Level Up
titleEnglish: The Player Who Can't Level Up
synonyms: The Player That Can't Level Up
The Player Who Can't Level Up: O Mestre dos Egos
เพลเยอร์เลเวลไม่อัป
synopsis: When Kim Kigyu received his invitation to become a player (a unique-ability player, at that), he thought his struggles were over. But no matter how hard he tries, he just can’t seem to get past level 1! After five years of working as a guide on the lower floors of the tower, he’s finally discovered his ability to link with “Egos” and raise his stats. As his new skills unlock adventures in unexplored gates, Kigyu gets his chance to defy expectations and show the world that rank isn’t everything. (Source: Tapas)

tags.description: A goblin is a monstrous creature from European folklore. They are almost always small and grotesque, mischievous or outright malicious, and greedy. Sometimes with magical abilities.

title: Suyo Webtoon-ui Na Kang-Rim
synopsis: Na Kang-Rim is a high school student who generally likes webtoons. One day, he experiences something bizarre: the female main character from a webtoon he often reads appeared before him. The incidents that happened in the webtoon started happening in the real world too, but the problem is that there is no hero to save her this time! So Kang-Rim decides to become the hero and save her. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Masin
synopsis: A hundred children were trapped on Hengshan. Only one walked out alive—a boy named Dan Hyeongwoo. He survived the hell created by the Cheon Gija and gained power worthy of being called that of a demon god in return. But the world felt unfamiliar to him, and its rules made no sense... So, he becomes an escort warrior of the Henan Escort Agency, relearning what people are and what the world is from the ground up. Everything he does is for one single purpose: the day he will take revenge on Cheon Gija. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Bullobulsaro Sandaneun Geoseun
synopsis: Roberta, a priestess of the church, is designated as the head priestess of a remote region in the northern edge—Dithmar. As the appointment came immediately after the disappearance of her predecessor, Roberta remained on guard and began to investigate Duke Ulrich of Dithmarschen. According to rumors, he has ruled over the region's lord for over 300 years, and even claimed to be an immortal... one who lives a life no human should be capable of possessing. Determined to uncover the truth, Roberta decides to trace his steps. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Angnyeonimui Choeaero Gantaekdoen Sajeong
synonyms: The Circumstances of Being Chosen as the Villainess's Favorite
How I Ended Up as the Villainess’s Favorite
synopsis: I’ve been reincarnated as Lariette, a lowly sidekick destined to be the female lead’s errand girl. Tired of being a doormat, I decide to switch sides and suck up to the empire’s most powerful villainess, Evangeline. But the “vicious” villainess is actually a total sweetheart! Not only is she showering me with gifts, she’s now insisting I marry her brother so we can be family forever. There’s just one problem: her brother is the original male lead, a man supposed to be obsessed with the original heroine. I’ve tried my best to keep my distance, but he won’t stop pursuing me. “What makes you think I’m not interested in you, My Lady?” (Source: KakaoPage, translated)
